mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_department WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptName}, '%')
ORDER BY last_operate_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_department WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_department (dept_name, last_operate_time, is_deleted, created_time) VALUES (#{deptName}, NOW(), 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_department SET dept_name = #{deptName}, last_operate_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_department SET is_deleted = 1, last_operate_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_department WHERE dept_name = #{deptName} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_department_log (dept_id, operate_type, before_name, after_name, operator_emp_id, operate_time) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{operateType}, #{beforeName}, #{afterName}, #{operatorEmpId}, NOW())
